tool.title: boolean (rappture2web)
tool.about:
Example of a Rappture <boolean> object.
Booleans are logical true/false values. When you click Simulate, the input booleans are echoed to the output.

about.label: Impact Ionization Model
about.description: Used to enable/disable the effects of impact ionization on the mobility model.

about.label: Impact Ionization Model 1
about.description: Used to enable/disable the effects of impact ionization on the mobility model.

about.label: Impact Ionization Model 2
about.description: Used to enable/disable the effects of impact ionization on the mobility model.

about.label: Impact Ionization Model 3
about.description: Used to enable/disable the effects of impact ionization on the mobility model.
